name: GridCellSelectionApi
description: The cell selection API interface that is available in the grid [[apiRef]].

properties.name: getCellSelectionModel
properties.description:
Returns an object containing the selection state of the cells.
The keys of the object correspond to the row IDs.
The value of each key is also an object, which has a column field for a key and a boolean value for its selection state.

properties.name: getSelectedCellsAsArray
properties.description:
Returns an array containing only the selected cells.
Each item is an object with the ID and field of the cell.

properties.name: isCellSelected
properties.description: Determines if a cell is selected or not.

properties.name: selectCellRange
properties.description: Selects all cells that are inside the range given by `start` and `end` coordinates.
properties.type: (start: { id: string | number, field: string }, end: { id: string | number, field: string }, keepOtherSelected?: boolean) => void

properties.name: setCellSelectionModel
properties.description:
Updates the cell selection model according to the value passed to the `newModel` argument.
Any cell already selected will be unselected.
